name: Revenue Officer Misconduct Informer Award

eligibility.description: The court may award up to one-half of the fine imposed on a convicted officer to the informer who provided the information.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers who provide information leading to the conviction of a federal revenue officer for extortion, fraud, or other unlawful acts may receive a portion of the fine imposed.
